summary: Comprehensive testing of Employee Autocomplete feature. All 9 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend autocomplete functionality fully verified - dropdown shows suggestions with correct format (Name | EMP ID | Email | Department badge), clicking suggestion fills search box and triggers filter, 'No matches found' message displays correctly, clicking outside closes dropdown, Enter key triggers search, Filter and Reset buttons work correctly.

features_tested.backend_autocomplete_no_query_param: PASS - GET /api/employees/autocomplete without q returns empty array
features_tested.backend_autocomplete_response_fields: PASS - Response has id, full_name, official_email, emp_id, department
features_tested.frontend_typing_shows_dropdown: PASS - Typing 'ven' shows autocomplete dropdown with 2 suggestions
features_tested.frontend_suggestion_format: PASS - Each suggestion shows: Avatar initial + Name + EMP ID · Email + Department badge
features_tested.frontend_click_suggestion_fills_search: PASS - Clicking suggestion fills search box with employee name
features_tested.frontend_click_suggestion_closes_dropdow: PASS - Dropdown closes after clicking suggestion
features_tested.frontend_no_matches_message: PASS - 'No matches found' message displays for non-matching query 'zzzzz'
features_tested.frontend_reset_button_works: PASS - Reset button clears search and filters
features_tested.frontend_employee_table_intact: PASS - Employee table layout unchanged with all columns

critical_code_review_comments: Backend autocomplete endpoint correctly implements case-insensitive regex search across full_name, official_email, emp_id, and custom_employee_id fields
Backend correctly limits results to max 10 for performance
Backend correctly returns empty array for empty/missing query parameter
Frontend correctly implements 350ms debounce to avoid excessive API calls
Frontend correctly shows 'Searching...' loading state while fetching
Frontend correctly shows 'No matches found' for empty results
Frontend correctly closes dropdown on outside click using useEffect with mousedown listener
Frontend suggestion format matches spec: Avatar initial + Name + EMP ID · Email + Department badge
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Used existing employees for testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Employee Autocomplete feature fully implemented and tested. Key features: (1) Backend endpoint GET /api/employees/autocomplete?q= searches by name/email/emp_id with case-insensitive regex, max 10 results. (2) Frontend uses 350ms debounce, shows dropdown with suggestions in format: Avatar + Name + EMP ID · Email + Department badge. (3) Clicking suggestion fills search box and triggers filter. (4) 'No matches found' shown for empty results. (5) Dropdown closes on outside click. Test file: /app/backend/tests/test_employee_autocomplete.py
